response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 18+ years of proven expertise, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He demonstrates strong proficiency in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and has current experience with AI-agent infrastructure. His software craftsmanship approach, testing focus, and track record of working at senior/staff levels across multiple companies align well with the role's needs. Primary gaps are the lack of explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions, and limited visibility on authentication/security depth, but these are learnable for a candidate of this caliber.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and systems; exceeds minimum requirement by 3x with clear senior/staff trajectory
Strong match on primary tech stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, with demonstrated proficiency across multiple senior roles
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly addresses the advanced requirement; deep testing and software craftsmanship focus evident
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being a primary framework requirement; experience appears to be with Node.js/GraphQL rather than NestJS specifically
Vitest not mentioned; testing experience centers on Jest and Selenium rather than the specific test runner listed as primary
Authentication, authorization, and security best-practices not prominently featured in resume; unclear depth in this required area

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience depth and seniority level
